title: Warm illustrated cafe baseline
thesis: A competent deployable cafe page using editorial type and code-native illustration, but with less sensory specificity than the photographic references.

visualContract.typography: Large serif display with sans-serif navigation and controls.
visualContract.composition: Balanced split hero with a contained arched illustration panel.
visualContract.texture: Light grain, botanical line art, soft shadow.

responsiveIntent: Implemented and verified at desktop, tablet, and mobile.
